fields.title: Effect codebase hygiene: fix real issues from review
fields.description: Fixes identified from an Effect-TS codebase review of extensions/tau. Scope is limited to issues with actual crash risk, maintainability burden, or type-safety violations. Explicitly excludes: sync FS operations (pragmatic for extension init), runSync/runPromise at pi API boundaries (by-design), try/catch in legacy modules (no benefit from rewriting), unconstrained Schema.Number (theoretical-only risk), and status/index.ts async throws (caught by Promise.allSettled).
fields.close_reason: All 4 tasks completed: tau-rs4.1 (unused param), tau-rs4.2 (JSON Schema validation), tau-rs4.3 (parser Schema), tau-rs4.4 (Theme type fix).
